examples: Special mistrust is reserved for the 300, 000 Bahais, because their movement broke away from and then rejected Shiism in the 19th century.
Well, first of all, Robert, as you say, I mean, I don't think one can emphasize enough that this city revolves around Shiism.
One chilly night, I went to Sayyida Zainab, a neighborhood centered around the shrine of the sister of Hussein, grandson of the Prophet and the central martyr of Shiism.
